name: Philippines
intro: The Philippines built the world's most sophisticated outsourcing industry, and that industry runs on delivery discipline. BPO and shared-services firms in Manila and Cebu promote team leads into programme roles constantly — and certification is the standard promotion currency, with PMP prized for client-facing credibility and Scrum credentials for the growing software delivery centres. Employers routinely reimburse fees because certified staff win contracts. Our live online weekend batch runs on the IST schedule, which converts to relaxed late-morning to evening hours in Philippine time, sparing you Manila traffic entirely. English instruction with an international cohort mirrors the global clients Filipino professionals serve daily. Afterwards comes structured exam application support, full-length mocks, and direct trainer access for doubts until the certificate is in hand.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in Philippines?
faq.a: The course fee is US$1,295 for PMP and US$695 for CSM, covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in Philippines?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across Philippines.
